calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-28-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alec Harrington appeared by zoom for Bernard Dubendris (Petitioner).

The Court stated that it has issue with the tax firm being engaged. Mr. Harrington stated that he does not have any connection from the tax work, that the tax firm is independent, but is owned by the same owner of the law firm, that he does not prepare the returns and that he does not receive any compensation. Mr. Harrington also stated that the rate charged was not out of the norm for this type of work and when asked by the Court what can be done about this, stated that he expects that his compensation can be reduced by the amount that was paid to the tax firm. The Court suggested that Mr. Harrington not use this tax firm and stated that if he does, he is to get Court approval first. The Frist Account and Report, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.
